summary: Initial setup and Orion OS creation
Organizer panel complete. Error interceptor pattern. Decision framework.
Staging environment fully operational. Self-contained migrations.
v1.3.0 deployed to production. Jest MatchService + AuthService tests.
OrganizationsService tests. CI + SonarCloud backend. GitFlow defined.
Atomic Design system started. OLGA.md created.
Olga MCP fix (npx instead of Docker).
Jest frontend setup. CI + SonarCloud frontend. Atomic Design refactor.
getMatches filters + MatchFiltersComponent. Material Symbols added.
Bruno activated. RFC flow defined. CI gameon-api fully green. .gitattributes LF enforcement.
Orion OS v1.1.0 Separation of Concerns. v1.2.0 Metrics & Observability. CHANGELOG created.
Short session. .gitignore merge conflict resolved (VS Code auto-closed). Stale local 'development' branch deleted. develop branch confirmed clean.
NutriApp Phase 1 complete. Monthly plan (Hoy/Semana/Mes), cook flow with stock deduction, MealActionSheet, ConfirmModal, RecipeModal. Full UI redesign with design system. Fixed bottom nav.

Orion OS v2.2.0. vision.md added as 5th standard project file (D100). gameon-vision.md created literal. nutriapp + portfoliomv vision stubs created. Pattern 04 captured: Orion lives in GitHub, not Claude. Claude Projects are runtime containers, not identity containers. Empty Orion OS Project in Claude (no files, just GitHub MCP).
